title: [The development of immunology in a century of research].
journal_full: Giornale di batteriologia, virologia ed immunologia
abstract: Immunology started in 1880 with the observation of Pasteur upon attenuated strains of Pasteurella aviseptica and evolved in nearly one century until the actual situation. Havig discussed the immunology topics, this review ends by stressing some of the recent landmarks in immunology.
